home.title: Helena Colaço | Artist
home.description: Helena Colaço is an artist based in Lisbon, Portugal. She creates art that explores the relationship between color, form, and emotion.
home.aboutDescription: With a life shaped by artistic exploration, from theatre to painting, photography, and poetry, she has built a rich and multidisciplinary creative path. Her work draws deeply from personal experience, performance, and visual storytelling, continually evolving between Lisbon and the south of Portugal.

drawing.title: Drawing
drawing.description: Intimate studies in charcoal, graphite and ink that capture the essence of a moment.

painting.title: Painting
painting.description: Paintings that explore the relationship between color, form, and emotion.

photography.title: Photography
photography.description: Photographs that capture the essence of a moment.

poem.title: Poetry
poem.description: Words shaped into small vessels of feeling, written alongside the visual work.

newsletter.title: Stay in Touch
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated with the latest creations, exhibitions and events.

contacts.title: Get in Touch
contacts.description: For commissions, collaborations or just to say hello.

content.name: Helena Colaço Salazar
content.p1: From an early age, she revealed a strong interest in the arts, enjoying drawing, photography, dance and other sports. At the age of thirteen she lost her father, an event that spontaneously led her to write poetry and draw, later choosing the arts field in high school.
content.p2: She began her career in theatre, where she worked as an actress for eleven years.
content.p3: In 2005 she returned to drawing through the development of the character Kelly, from Wayne Jordan’s play The Drowned World. From this experience came the public exhibition The Imaginary World of Kelly. Later, in 2010, she presented her first solo painting exhibition, Appearances, also inspired by a theatre play with the same name, staged at Sociedade de Instrução Guilherme Cossoul.
content.p4: Her desire to explore new forms of expression beyond acting led her to study New Painting Techniques at the National Society of Fine Arts, as well as Photography at the Portuguese Institute of Photography.
content.p5: She completed internships as a photojournalist at the newspapers Público and i, and also photographed theatre plays, concerts, vernissages, architecture and developed authorial photography projects.
content.p6: In 2014 she moved to Tróia, where she lived for three years working on the concept of Identity, which later took her on a nomadic path between 2017 and 2023. That year she returned to Tróia and began preparing her next solo painting exhibition, From My Mother Paintings, presented at Fábrica do Braço de Prata, in Lisbon, in 2025. Over these years she also participated in several collective exhibitions of photography and painting.
content.p7: Today she divides her time between Lisbon and the south of Portugal, continuously expanding her creative practice as a visual artist.

collection.noWorks: No works in this collection yet.

footer.headline: Through lines, colors, lenses, and words — a journey of self-expression, where each stroke, click, and verse unveils a new dimension of the soul.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies & analytics
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies for basic functionality and, with your permission, analytics to improve this website.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | aiRoast.app
meta.description: We collect almost nothing. No accounts, no email, pitch data discarded immediately.

hero.weDontCollect: We don't want your data. Really.
hero.subtext: aiRoast is built on a simple principle: your pitch is yours. We process it, roast it, and forget it.

controller.title: Who We Are
controller.body: aiRoast.app is operated by Cereja Investment, Lda., registered at Travessa do Girassol, n61 3D, 2775-811 Carcavelos, Portugal. For privacy inquiries: privacy@airoast.app

corePromise.title: Our Core Promise
corePromise.noEmail: 📧 No email collection — Stripe handles payments, not us.
corePromise.noStorage: 🗑️ Pitch data discarded immediately after roast generation.
corePromise.lifetime: Your data lives only as long as it takes to generate your PDF (~30 seconds). After that, it's gone.

dataCollected.title: What We Collect
dataCollected.limited: We collect the absolute minimum to make the product work:

payment.title: Payment data
payment.description: Processed entirely by Stripe. We never see your credit card details. We store only: payment confirmation, amount, timestamp.

analytics.title: Anonymous usage data
analytics.description: To improve the product, we track:

analytics.title: Product improvement
analytics.description: Anonymous analytics help us fix drop-offs and build features founders actually want.

improvement.title: Roast quality
improvement.description: We may retain anonymized excerpts to improve prompt quality — never raw pitch text.

items.marketing: Marketing emails — we don't have your email

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.body: Under GDPR, our legal basis is:
legalBasis.gdpr: Legitimate interests (improving the product) + consent (for non-essential cookies)
legalBasis.ccpa: We don't sell data. Full stop.

thirdParties.title: Third Parties
thirdParties.body: We use these services to run the product. Each has its own privacy policy:

retention.title: Data Retention

pitchData.title: Pitch text & answers:
pitchData.description: Deleted immediately after PDF generation (typically <60 seconds). Never written to disk.

analytics.title: Analytics events:
analytics.description: Retained for 12 months, then anonymized. Used only to improve conversion.

payment.title: Payment records:
payment.description: Retained for 7 years (tax/legal requirements). No payment details, just confirmation.

retention.audit: You can request deletion of any analytics data linked to your session ID at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

items.access: Access data we hold about you

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies only (session management, security). No tracking cookies, no third-party marketing cookies.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: If we change how we handle data, we'll update this page and notify users via the website.

contact.title: Contact
contact.response: We aim to respond within 48 hours.
